hero.headline: Connecting Chile with the World
hero.subheadline: Comprehensive international logistics, customs advisory, and digital consulting solutions for businesses that think big.

services.title: Complete Solutions for Your Business
services.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive range of logistics and digital services tailored to the needs of international companies.

import_export.name: Import & Export
import_export.description: We manage your foreign trade operations with efficiency and full regulatory compliance.

customs.name: Customs Advisory
customs.description: Experts in tariff classification, customs regimes, and border cost optimization.

logistics.name: International Logistics
logistics.description: Multimodal transport coordination: air, sea, and land globally.

digital.name: Digital Consulting
digital.description: Digital transformation of logistics processes to maximize efficiency and traceability.

documents.name: Document Management
documents.description: Preparation, review, and processing of all foreign trade documentation.

support.name: 24/7 Support
support.description: Continuous assistance to resolve incidents and keep your operations running without interruption.

form.title: Ready to Get Started?
form.subtitle: Fill out the form and our team will contact you within 24 hours.
form.name: Full name
form.description_placeholder: Describe your need in as much detail as possible (minimum 20 characters)...
form.success_message: We have received your quote request. Our team will get in touch with you within 24 hours.
form.error_message: An error occurred while sending your request. Please try again.

validation.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.phone_min: Phone must be at least 7 characters
validation.description_min: Description must be at least 20 characters

footer.tagline: Connecting Chile with the world through world-class logistics solutions.
